pro.shushi.pamirs.base.model.meta.Module.name: pro.shushi.pamirs.resource
pro.shushi.pamirs.base.model.meta.Module.author: 数式
pro.shushi.pamirs.base.model.meta.Module.description: 丰富的多类型资源集中管理，如任务管理、国际化资源、用户权限、组织架构等，为您的业务创新提供基础资源支撑

pro.shushi.pamirs.base.model.resource.Re.name: 中国
pro.shushi.pamirs.base.model.resource.Re.completeName: 中华人民共和国(People's Republic of China)
pro.shushi.pamirs.base.model.resource.Re.addrFormat:
<view widget="form">
        <config label-width="200" layout="vertical"/>
        <group title="" widget="fieldset" cols="4">
          <field name="id" widget="Input" invisible="true" span="1" />
          <field name="country" widget="SelectAddr" span="1" />
          <field name="province" widget="SelectAddr" span="1" />
          <field name="city" widget="SelectAddr" span="1" />
          <field name="district" widget="SelectAddr" span="1" />
          <field name="street" widget="SelectAddr" span="1" />
          <field name="street2" widget="TextArea" span="1" />
          <field name="fullAddress" readonly="true" widget="TextArea" span="1" />
        </group>
      </view>
pro.shushi.pamirs.base.model.resource.Re.namePosition:
<view widget="form">
        <config label-width="200" layout="vertical"/>
        <group title="" widget="fieldset" cols="4">
 <field name="id" widget="Input" invisible="true" span="1" />
          <field name="firstName" widget="Input" span="1" />
          <field name="midName" widget="Input" span="1" />
          <field name="lastName" widget="Input" span="1" />          
        </group>
      </view>
